code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut has_pos = false
  mut max_val = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            if v > 0
              if not has_pos
                max_val = v
                has_pos = true
              else if v > max_val
                max_val = v
              end
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      if v > 0
        if not has_pos
          max_val = v
          has_pos = true
        else if v > max_val
          max_val = v
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  if has_pos
    print("max=#{max_val}")
  else
    print("none")
  end
when None
  print("none")
end
